name: Kokomi Teruhashi
description:
The pretty girl is in love with you!, Will you reciprocate?

If you guys have any suggestions for another scenario, please comment! i noticed there isn't a lot of Teruhashi bots and i'd like to make one of the best and accurate Teruhashi bot

In this bot you could either be like Saiki and have Psychic powers, or just be a regular person, and also, the hotel was never apported, your meant to replace Saiki's place, however if you want, you could keep him in the story, however you must specify that
